title: Business Development Manager
description:
Job Description


To develop new and appropriate marketing strategies to enhance company growth by bringing in new business with concentration Locally and within Intra-Asia. The incumbent must have a deep understanding of market & competition to develop appropriate winning sales strategies and apply the sales and solutions expertise, in conjunction with in-house subject matter experts.

The goal is to boost overseas routing order (RO) shipments and to forge strong relationships with all clients. You will be the front of the company and will need to create and apply an effective sales strategy while increasing customer satisfaction and loyalty.

You are also expected to represent the company to negotiate for the best possible advantage with carriers, service providers and maintain good rapport with all.


Key Responsibilities

· Responsible for getting in new clients.

· Build and nurture strong relationships with existing clients and identify sales leads to develop new business opportunity.

· Act as the main point of contact for client inquiries and concerns.

· Identify and pursue new business opportunities within the logistics sector.

· Conduct market research to discover potential clients and industries.

· Develop and implement effective sales strategies to meet and exceed revenue targets.

· Collaborate with the sales team to create compelling proposals and presentations.

· Negotiate terms and conditions with clients to secure mutually beneficial agreements.

· Work closely with internal teams, including operations and customer service, to ensure seamless service delivery.

· Provide regular sales reports and updates to the management team.

· Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction through proactive communication and issue resolution.

· Stay informed about industry trends, competitor activities, carriers and market conditions.

· Work on tenders/RFQs/Bids if required

postedCompany.description:
TIC Traffic International Consortium (S) Pte Ltd is founded by a team of experienced professionals who have more than 20 years' of experience in managing Air and Ocean freight forwarding services. Our team is capable of handling all kinds of shipments, be it garments/apparels, electronics, AOG, DG, OOG and more.

With the change in market demands, we focus on providing services to companies in the high-tech semi-conductors, aviation and aerospace, and the E-Commerce Industry. We possess the capability of handling sensitive laboratory equipment, personal effects, dangerous goods, as well as valuable cargo.

With our proximity advantage in the Free Trade Zone (FTZ) of Changi Airfreight Centre, our office and warehousing facility offers a seamless and reliable transhipment and re-exporting services via air or air-sea shipment services.

We pride ourselves in offering a one-stop service station for customs clearance and customers’ freight and shipping needs, offering port-to-port and door-to-door services across our ever-expanding network of agencies, spanning major international gateways and continents.
postedCompany.name: TIC TRAFFIC INTERNATIONAL CONSORTIUM (S) PTE. LTD.
